items.title: Is Warren Buffett Really Fleeing Stocks? These 18 Words From the Billionaire Offer a Strikingly Clear Answer.
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: Warren Buffett has been a net seller of stocks, but his recent comments suggest he is not fleeing the stock market. Instead, he may be cautious about high valuations and selectively buying quality stocks at reasonable prices.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Buffett reduced his position in Apple, but the company remains Berkshire Hathaway's biggest holding.
Buffett also reduced his position in Bank of America, but the company remains a significant investment for Berkshire Hathaway.
